category_sources: Official README describes EulerPy as a command line tool for solving Project Euler problems using Python.
source_facts.description says EulerPy is a Project Euler command-line tool written in Python.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use the display name EulerPy.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official repository; README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, and source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub source repository.
tags_sources: Official README supports problem-solving and programming-practice tags.
source_facts.description supports Project Euler, Python, and command-line tags.
